---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature, integration, or quality-of-life improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What is the user-facing pain you are trying to solve? Skip "I want X" — explain the situation that produced the want.

## Proposal

What would the feature look like? Optional sketches, mockups, or example flows are welcome.

## Alternatives considered

If you have already worked around this, describe how. If a similar feature exists in another tool, link it.

## Scope hint

- [ ] Editor / Monaco
- [ ] LaTeX / Typst compile pipeline
- [ ] PDF preview / SyncTeX
- [ ] AI assistant / IM
- [ ] Overleaf sync
- [ ] Settings / preferences
- [ ] Other: ___
